case_title: DESOTO CAB COMPANY VS. ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,527.37 FILED BY DESOTO CAB COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW. FILED BY DESOTO CAB COMPANY ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESOTO CAB COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY $1,527.37 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,702.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$125.00) SERVED JUL-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACADEMY OF ART UNIVERSITY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-11-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GREG COCHRAN--GENERAL MANAGER; STEVE CHATZ--CLAIMS ADJUSTER; MOHAMMAD AHINEDIN; GREG KOFFMAN. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT JONES--EMPLOYER; AL "ABDALLAH" SALMAN--SAFETY MANGER; ROB HENDRICKS--TRANSPORTATION OPERATIONS MANAGER AND ROGER LEWIS. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
